feed.title: PolyGen Game
feed.subtitle: The PolyGen game using RFID cards to capture devices

entry.title: EMF 2026 The game is on
entry.summary: PolyGen has been deployed across EMF Camp! Grab your RFID tokens from PolyGen HQ located nextdoor to Spark Life. You can take a white token for free, or buy one of the custom RFID tokens. These will be relocated to the bar in Null Sector once it opens. The game is operational and can be played between 21:00 on Thursday and 22:00 on Sunday. Pick your team and capture as many units as possib...

entry.title: EMF 2026 Meet the teams
entry.summary: Polybius Biotech calls on everyone at EMF Camp to take control of the deployed PolyGen portable power generators and direct the power to the team of their choice. You can use most normal RFID cards that you already have, or you’ll be able to pick up a free RFID card from the bar in Nullsector or PolyGen HQ (location to be confirmed). There will be themed 3D printed tokens available to buy if ...

entry.title: 39C3 Game Results
entry.summary: 39C3 is over and so we must analyse the stats from the PolyGen game! General Stats Total players: 1,681 Total players scoring over 1,000 points: 1,134 Total players score: 11,392,010 Total unit captures: 30,294 Total unit visits: 33,164 Total output boosts: 2,899 Players who set a codename: 257 Players too lazy to set a codename: 1,424 Maximum Units Online: 36 Units Faile...

entry.title: PolyGen at 39C3
entry.summary: Polybius Biotech are pleased to announce the deployment of PolyGen portable fusion generates across the 39C3 event site. How to play To play you simply need an RFID card. Most cards will work, although anything that generates a dynamic identifier such as mobile phones and some bank cards will not work. Your objective is to keep as many of the units aligned to your team as possible. You can...

entry.title: WAMP2025 Game Results
entry.summary: WAMP 2025 is over and so we must analyse the stats from this year’s PolyGen game! General Stats Total players: 130 Total players scoring over 1,000 points: 103 Total players score: 3,471,709 Total unit captures: 9,552 Total unit visits: 8,814 Total output boosts: 903 Players who set a codename: 56 Players too lazy to set a codename: 74 Maximum Units Online: 17 Units Faile...
